source_title: State Department UAP Cable 2, Kazakhstan, January 31, 1994
description_blurb:
This document is a U.S. Department of State diplomatic cable from the U.S. Embassy in Dushanbe, Tajikistan to the Secretary of State in Washington, D.C. on January 31, 1994.
On January 27, 1994 one Tajik pilot and three American citizens encountered an UAP flying a 747 jet at 41,000 feet over Kazakhstan.  Object was a bright light of enormous intensity and approached over the horizon to the east at great speed and a much higher altitude.  Several pictures were taken of the craft making 90 degree turns, doing corkscrews and maneuvering in circles a great rates of speed.  Object was reported as resembling a bullet in flight.  Visual estimation of the contrails were at 100,000 feet, which was too high to leave contrails by ordinary aircraft.
title: State Department UAP Cable 2, Kazakhstan, January 31, 1994
summary: On January 27, 1994, Tajik Air Chief Pilot Ed Rhodes, an American citizen, and two American pilot colleagues encountered a UFO while flying a Boeing 747SP at 41,000 feet over Kazakhstan. The object appeared as a bright light of enormous intensity, approaching from the east at great speed and higher altitude. It performed maneuvers including circles, corkscrews, and 90-degree turns at rapid rates of speed and high G's. Captain Rhodes took several photos. The object was described as resembling a bullet in flight due to its light emission. It left contrails estimated at 100,000 feet, an altitude too high for ordinary aircraft to produce them. The crew believed the object was extraterrestrial and under intelligent control. The State Department reported the incident without offering an opinion.
reported_object_description: Bright light of enormous intensity, resembling a high-speed photo of a bullet in flight (a very small object giving off a much larger trailing wave of heat/light). Its shape was indiscernible due to darkness.
reported_behavior: Approached from over the horizon to the east at great speed and a much higher altitude. Maneuvered in circles, corkscrews, and made 90-degree turns at rapid rates of speed and under very high G's. Adopted a horizontal high-speed course and disappeared. Left contrails at approximately 100,000 feet.
official_resolution: We have no opinion and report the above for what it may be worth.
bust_reasoning: The report involves three experienced commercial pilots observing a UAP for 40 minutes, describing complex, high-G maneuvers (circles, corkscrews, 90-degree turns) and leaving contrails at an estimated 100,000 feet. The pilots explicitly ruled out meteors and stated that contrails at that altitude are impossible for ordinary aircraft, indicating behavior incompatible with known prosaic explanations. The multi-witness convergence and specific details of kinematics and signature resist easy mundane explanation, placing it in the 15-34 score range.
full_text:
# State Department UAP Cable 2, Kazakhstan, January 31, 1994 - Page 1

UNCLASSIFIED

CSP-2025-00040 B-00002707028 "UNCLASSIFIED" 3/2/2026

UNCLASSIFIED

[Department of State Seal]

MRN: 94 DUSHANBE 259
Date/DTG: Jan 31, 1994 / 310000Z Jan 94
From: AMEMBASSY DUSHANBE
Action: WASHDC, SECSTATE ROUTINE; MOSCOW, AMEMBASSY ROUTINE
E.O.: Unknown
TAGS: TSPA, EAIR, KZ, TI, TAJIK AIR, (RHODES, ED)
Reference: n/a
Subject: TAJIK AIR PILOTS REPORT UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECT

UNCLASSIFIED

PAGE 01 DUSHAN 00259 310310Z
ACTION OES-09

INFO LOG-00 AID-01 AMAD-01 OASY-00 DOTE-00 EAP-01 EB-01
EUR-01 FAAE-00 TEDE-00 INR-00 ADS-00 NSAE-00 SSO-00
SNIS-00 NISC-02 /016W
-----------------1FA298 310310Z /38

R 310258Z JAN 94
FM AMEMBASSY DUSHANBE
TO SECSTATE WASHDC 2150
INFO AMEMBASSY MOSCOW
AMEMBASSY TASHKENT
AMEMBASSY ASHGABAT
AMEMBASSY ALMATY
AMEMBASSY BEIJING
AMEMBASSY BISHKEK
CIA WASHDC 0224
DIA WASHDC 0232

UNCLAS DUSHANBE 00259

DEPARTMENT FOR OES/S

E.O. 12356: N/A
TAGS: TSAP, EAIR, TI
SUBJECT: TAJIK AIR PILOTS REPORT UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECT

1. TAJIK AIR CHIEF PILOT, AMCIT ED RHODES, AND HIS TWO AMERICAN
PILOT COLLEAGUES REPORTED JANUARY 29 THAT, ON JANUARY 27, THEY
HAD ENCOUNTERED A UFO WHILE FLYING AT 41,000 FEET IN THEIR BOEING
UNCLASSIFIED

+---------------------------------------+
| Released in Full                      |
| John Powers, Acting-Director          |
| US Department of State                |
| 2/25/2026                             |
+---------------------------------------+

UNCLASSIFIED Page 1 of 3



# State Department UAP Cable 2, Kazakhstan, January 31, 1994 - Page 2

UNCLASSIFIED

CSP-2025-00040 B-00002707028 "UNCLASSIFIED" 3/2/2026

UNCLASSIFIED

PAGE 02 DUSHAN 00259 310310Z
747SP AT LAT 45 NORTH AND LONG 55 EAST, OVER KAZAKHSTAN. THEY FIRST ENCOUNTERED THE OBJECT AS A BRIGHT LIGHT OF ENORMOUS INTENSITY, APPROACHING THEM FROM OVER THE HORIZON TO THE EAST AT A GREAT RATE OF SPEED AND AT A MUCH HIGHER ALTITUDE THAN THEIR OWN. THEY WATCHED THE OBJECT FOR SOME FORTY MINUTES AS IT MANEUVERED IN CIRCLES, CORKSCREWS AND MADE 90-DEGREE TURNS AT RAPID RATES OF SPEED AND UNDER VERY HIGH G'S. CAPTAIN RHODES TOOK SEVERAL PHOTOS WITH A POCKET OLYMPUS CAMERA AND WILL SEND COPIES TO THE EMBASSY AND THE TAJIKISTAN DESK (LOWRY TAYLOR) IN THE DEPARTMENT, IF THEY COME OUT. AFTER SOME TIME, THE OBJECT ADOPTED A HORIZONTAL HIGH-SPEED COURSE AND DISAPPEARED OVER THE HORIZON.

2. AS IT WAS DARK WHEN THE OBJECT WAS OBSERVED, THE CREW WERE UNABLE TO DISCERN ITS SHAPE. THEY DESCRIBED THE LIGHT IT EMITTED AS HAVING A "BOW WAVE" AND AS RESEMBLING A HIGH-SPEED PHOTO OF A BULLET IN FLIGHT, IN WHICH A VERY SMALL OBJECT GIVES OFF A MUCH LARGER TRAILING WAVE OF HEAT/LIGHT. SOME FORTY-FIVE MINUTES AFTER THE INITIAL SIGHTING, AS THE SUN WAS RISING, THE AIRCRAFT FLEW UNDER THE CONTRAILS WHICH THE OBJECT HAD LEFT BEHIND. THE PLANE WAS MAKING OVER 500 KNOTS. RHODES ESTIMATED THE ALTITUDE OF THE CONTRAILS AT APPROXIMATELY 100,000 FEET, NOTING THAT THERE IS TOO LITTLE AIR/MOISTURE AT THAT EXTREME ALTITUDE TO ENABLE THE CREATION OF CONTRAILS BY THE PROPULSION MECHANISMS OF ORDINARY AIRCRAFT WHICH MIGHT BE ABLE TO REACH THAT HEIGHT. THE PATHS OF THE CONTRAILS REFLECTED THE MANEUVERS OF THE OBJECT, I.E., CIRCLES, CORKSCREWS, ETC.

3. TO OUR SUGGESTION THAT THE OBJECT MIGHT HAVE BEEN A METEOR ENTERING AND SKIPPING OFF THE EARTH'S ATMOSPHERE, RHODES AND HIS CREW WERE ADAMANT THAT THEY HAD SEEN THOUSANDS OF "FALLING STARS"
UNCLASSIFIED

UNCLASSIFIED

PAGE 03 DUSHAN 00259 310310Z
AND OTHER SPACE JUNK ENTERING THE ATMOSPHERE IN THEIR YEARS OF FLYING PASSENGER AIRCRAFT FOR PANAM. THIS, THEY INSISTED, WAS NOTHING LIKE A METEOR. ON THE BASIS OF ITS SPEED AND MANEUVERABILITY, RHODES EXPRESSED THE OPINION, WHICH HIS CREW SEEMED TO SUPPORT, THAT THE OBJECT WAS EXTRATERRESTRIAL AND UNDER INTELLIGENT CONTROL.

4. COMMENT: WE HAVE NO OPINION AND REPORT THE ABOVE FOR WHAT IT MAY BE WORTH.

ESCUDERO

UNCLASSIFIED

Page 2 of 3



# State Department UAP Cable 2, Kazakhstan, January 31, 1994 - Page 3

UNCLASSIFIED
CSP-2025-00040 B-00002707028 "UNCLASSIFIED" 3/2/2026

NNNN

================================================================================

Dissemination Rule: Archive Copy

UNCLASSIFIED

UNCLASSIFIED                                                                    Page 3 of 3
cover_up_reasoning: The document is explicitly marked 'UNCLASSIFIED' and 'Released in Full' with no redactions, classified references, or indications of suppressed information. All names and details are openly provided.
title_zh: 美国国务院UAP电报2号，哈萨克斯坦，1994年1月31日
summary_zh: 1994年1月27日，塔吉克航空首席飞行员埃德·罗兹（美国公民）及其两名美国籍飞行员同事在驾驶一架波音747SP飞机于哈萨克斯坦上空41,000英尺高度飞行时，遭遇不明飞行物（UFO）。该物体呈现为一道极其明亮的强光，从东方以极高速度和更高海拔接近。其执行了包括盘旋、螺旋飞行和90度转弯等机动动作，速度极快且承受高G力。罗兹机长拍摄了数张照片。该物体因其发光而被描述为类似于飞行中的子弹。其留下了据估计在100,000英尺高度的凝结尾迹，此高度远超普通飞机产生凝结尾迹的上限。机组人员认为该物体为地外来源且受智能控制。美国国务院报告了此事件，但未发表任何意见。
reported_object_description_zh: 极其明亮的强光，类似于高速飞行中子弹的照片（一个非常小的物体发出远大于其自身的拖曳热/光波）。因黑暗无法辨别其形状。
reported_behavior_zh: 从东方地平线外以极高速度和更高海拔接近。以极快速度和极高G力执行盘旋、螺旋飞行和90度转弯等机动动作。采取水平高速航线后消失。在约100,000英尺高度留下凝结尾迹。
official_resolution_zh: 我方不发表任何意见，仅将上述情况如实报告，供参考。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该报告涉及三名经验丰富的商业飞行员对UAP进行了40分钟的观察，描述了复杂的、高G力的机动动作（盘旋、螺旋飞行、90度转弯），并在据估计100,000英尺高度留下凝结尾迹。飞行员明确排除了流星的可能性，并指出普通飞机不可能在该高度产生凝结尾迹，表明其行为与已知的普通解释不符。多名目击者证词的一致性以及运动学和特征的具体细节，使得简单的世俗解释难以成立，将其置于15-34分的评分范围。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件明确标注为“非密级”并“完整发布”，未经任何删节、不含密级引用，亦无任何信息被压制的迹象。所有姓名和细节均公开提供。
claims: UFO encountered by pilots at 41,000 feet over Kazakhstan
Object was a bright light of enormous intensity
Object performed rapid maneuvers including circles, corkscrews, and 90-degree turns
Object left contrails at an estimated 100,000 feet, too high for ordinary aircraft
Witnesses believed the object was extraterrestrial and under intelligent control
Photos were taken of the object
claims_zh: 飞行员在哈萨克斯坦上空41,000英尺处遭遇不明飞行物
该物体为一道极其明亮的强光
该物体执行了包括盘旋、螺旋飞行和90度转弯在内的快速机动动作
该物体在据估计100,000英尺高度留下凝结尾迹，此高度远超普通飞机产生凝结尾迹的上限
目击者认为该物体为地外来源且受智能控制
witnesses: Ed Rhodes (Tajik Air Chief Pilot, American citizen)
bust_explanations: High-altitude rocket or satellite re-entry/debris: While the pilots ruled out meteors, a controlled re-entry or tumbling debris could produce bright lights. However, the described complex maneuvers (circles, corkscrews, 90-degree turns at high G's) and 40-minute duration are inconsistent with uncontrolled objects. The contrails at 100,000 feet are also problematic.

Distant aircraft with unusual lighting/atmospheric effects: The 'bright light of enormous intensity' could be an aircraft at a very high altitude or distance, possibly distorted by atmospheric conditions. However, the described high-G maneuvers and the estimated 100,000 ft contrails are incompatible with any known aircraft.

Atmospheric phenomenon (e.g., mirage, unusual cloud formation): The 'bow wave' description might suggest an optical effect. However, the consistent, prolonged, and highly structured maneuvers (circles, corkscrews, 90-degree turns) observed by three pilots over 40 minutes, followed by contrails reflecting these maneuvers, make a purely atmospheric phenomenon highly improbable.
bust_explanations_zh: 高空火箭或卫星再入/碎片：尽管飞行员排除了流星，但受控再入或翻滚的碎片可能产生亮光。然而，所描述的复杂机动动作（盘旋、螺旋飞行、高G力90度转弯）和40分钟的持续时间与不受控物体不符。100,000英尺高度的凝结尾迹也存在问题。
带有异常灯光/大气效应的远距离飞机：该“极其明亮的强光”可能是在极高海拔或远距离的飞机，可能受到大气条件的影响而失真。然而，所描述的高G力机动动作和据估计100,000英尺的凝结尾迹与任何已知飞机都不符。
大气现象（例如海市蜃楼、异常云层）：对“弓形波”的描述可能暗示一种光学效应。然而，三名飞行员在40分钟内观察到的持续、长时间且高度结构化的机动动作（盘旋、螺旋飞行、90度转弯），以及随后反映这些机动动作的凝结尾迹，使得纯粹的大气现象极不可能。
